source_pr.title: *: the result of `admin show ddl ...` shows a job‘s start time
source_pr.body:
Remove the useless field of `LastUpdateTS` in Job.
Add the field of `StartTS` and support showing the start time in the result of `admin show ddl ...`.

symptoms: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
failure_signature: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR replaces Job.LastUpdateTS with Job.StartTS and updates `admin show ddl ...` output formatting, plus adds a small unit test. The case evidence here is only a comment about passing `make race`, without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix, so we keep the conservative insufficient-evidence classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
files: domain/schema_validator.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/stat.go, executor/executor.go, model/ddl.go, model/model_test.go
